title: Create: Cats Don't Care (CCDC)
description: Lets cats find cozy spots to sit and sleep around your Create factories.
body: !["Description" Title](https://github.com/ZipeStudio/Vault/blob/main/design/mods/main/ZSdescription.png?raw=true) ![banner](https://github.com/ZipeStudio/create-cats-dont-care/blob/master/img/showcase.png?raw=true) **Create: Cats Don't Care** — Lets cats find cozy spots to sit and sleep around your Create factories. They can: - Sit on conveyor belts - Sleep on slow-moving belts - Relax around your Create factories More cozy interactions with Create blocks may come in future updates. !["Compatibility" Title](https://github.com/ZipeStudio/Vault/blob/main/design/mods/main/ZScompatible.png?raw=true) ### Multiplayer Friendly - Works perfectly in multiplayer - Fully synchronized for all players ### Mod Compatibility - Designed to work naturally with Create modpacks - Compatible with resource packs and shaders ![showcase](https://github.com/ZipeStudio/create-cats-dont-care/blob/master/img/showcase.gif?raw=true) !["Support" Title](https://github.com/ZipeStudio/Vault/blob/main/design/mods/main/ZSsupport.png?raw=true) ### Want to support mod and authors? Just tell everyone about this mod! Yeah, you got it right. Just by advertising, you will support the mod and the creators well. The more people will know about this mod, the more downloads it will have, more downloads will give good motivation to authors and increase income from the site (literally free donation). **Remember, advertising must not be intrusive and annoiyng!** ### What you can do? - Make a video review / advertisement - Share it on social media or Discord - Tell your friends about this mod - Add it to your modpack or just download and enjoy the game > Every mention matters — thank you for helping the community grow 🤍 !["Licensing" Title](https://github.com/ZipeStudio/Vault/blob/main/design/mods/main/ZSlicensing.png?raw=true) ### [See the original mod repository](https://github.com/ZipeStudio/create-cats-dont-care)
